heading: Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
label: 150109 Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)150109(a)36:2308(f)., , §§ 8(f), 15 (1st sentence), , 129.Apr. 10, 1984Pub. L. 98–25798 Stat. 128150109(b)36:2314 (1st sentence).
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)150109(a)36:2308(f)., , §§ 8(f), 15 (1st sentence), , 129.Apr. 10, 1984Pub. L. 98–25798 Stat. 128150109(b)36:2314 (1st sentence).

children.heading: .—Corporate Status
children.label: a .—Corporate Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as a corporation incorporated under the laws of the District of Columbia.

children.heading: .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.label: b .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
